de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface SchemaVariable

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSV, FormulaSV, ModalOperatorSV, ProgramSV, SkolemTermSV, TermLabelSV, TermSV, UpdateSV, VariableSV

    public interface SchemaVariable
extends ParsableVariable
    This interface represents the root of a schema variable hierarchy to be express termstructures that match on logical terms. Schema variables are used in Taclets where they act as placeholders for other TermSymbols. The TermSymbols a SchemaVariable is allowed to match is specified by their type and sort.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean isStrict() 
      String proofToString()
      Creates a parseable string representation of the declaration of the schema variable.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.SortedOperator

        argSort, argSorts, sort

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Operator

        arity, bindVarsAt, isRigid, sort, validTopLevel

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name

    • Method Detail

      • isStrict

        boolean isStrict()
        Returns:
        true if the schemavariable has the strict modifier which forces the instantiation to have exactly the same sort as the schemavariable (or if the sv is of generic sort - the instantiation of the generic sort)

      • proofToString

        String proofToString()
        Creates a parseable string representation of the declaration of the schema variable.
